items.briefing:
With the school holiday period underway, Australian organisations face heightened risk of cyber fraud as staffing levels drop and oversight weakens — scammers exploit these gaps to push through fraudulent payments or phishing attacks. Separately, a job scam targeting marketing professionals is hijacking Google accounts by posing as well-known brands, so staff should be cautious of unsolicited job offers requesting login credentials.

Security leaders are also being reminded to prioritise cybersecurity basics, as AI tools are accelerating how quickly attackers can find and exploit vulnerabilities.

**Tip:** If you receive an unexpected job offer or payment request, verify it through a known contact before clicking any links or sharing account details.

featured.title: Telstra mobile outage disrupts services across Australia
featured.quote: Major Telstra outage disrupts voice and data services across Australia, affecting millions of users nationwide.
